title: Saudi Arabian Dal Stew
description: A flavorful and nutritious stew originating from Saudi Arabia, made with aromatic spices and protein-rich dal.

ingredients.name: arabian
ingredients.notes: use a mix of ground spices including cumin, coriander, and turmeric

ingredients.name: dal
ingredients.notes: red or yellow split lentils work well

ingredients.name: silky
ingredients.notes: use coconut milk or heavy cream for a rich texture

ingredients.name: beans
ingredients.notes: kidney beans or cannellini beans work well

ingredients.name: saudi
ingredients.notes: use a mix of olive oil and safflower oil

ingredients.name: water
ingredients.notes: use vegetable or chicken broth for added flavor

instructions: Heat the saudi oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add the dal, beans, water, salt, and arabian spice mix. Bring to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20-25 minutes, or until the dal is tender.
Stir in the silky coconut milk and cook for an additional 5 minutes, or until heated through.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh cilantro or parsley if desired.
